title: Player Milking
description: a datapack which allows to milk players
body:
Simple datapack which gives you milk whenever you hurt a player with an empty bucket im your hand.
### ATTENTION! after the first launch, load the datapack.
To load the datapack, enter ```/function milking:load``` in chat. (it prevents stacked buckets voiding)
